remindersAreNotFinished.content: Right now, all o' this be just a preview for yer eyes! Ye may be able to stash yer reminders at some point, but keep in mind that this be not yet wired to any signal system! If ye be sailin' on Android, ye should already be able to rig some stuff that'll work when we finish up the hull o' the system, but bear in mind that this won't work on the Web version, so don't be gettin' too excited 'bout usin' reminders on yer land-lubbin' computer. Also, if ye be a developer, lend us a hand, matey!

eventBased.title: Triggerin' event
eventBased.addedToFront: After a matey has been added to front
eventBased.removedFromFront: After a matey has been removed from front

delete.title: Scuttle the reminder
delete.confirm: Be ye sure ye want to scuttle this reminder?
